title: Sprint 4 Day 03 — Wiki ingest scripts + axe-core devDep + 28 unit tests + CoV 3x 12248
scope: Day 03 runtime delivery pivot: 2 production scripts (wiki-build-batch-input.mjs + wiki-validate-file.mjs) + axe-core devDep + 28 new unit tests + CoV 3x deterministic 12248
mcp_calls_detail: MCP target not met Day 24 (0 explicit / ≥10 required). Substituted with native Read/Grep/Bash for cheap operations. GAP-DAY24-06 flagged. Day 25 structured discipline required.
artifacts: scripts/wiki-build-batch-input.mjs (215 lines, deterministic JSONL emitter, CLI --type --out --limit, smoke 117 records PASS)
scripts/wiki-validate-file.mjs (168 lines, SCHEMA v0.1.0 validator, PZ v3 grep + front-matter + sections + citation, exit 0/1)
tests/e2e/helpers/axe-helper.js (axe-core Playwright stub for S4.2.2 Day 25 wiring)
docs/handoff/2026-04-24-day-24-end.md (executive summary + metrics delta + risks + debt + recommendations Day 25)
decisions_captured: Together AI Batch API JSONL schema: { custom_id, body: { model: 'meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-Turbo', temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 2048, messages: [system(PZ v3 + required sections), user(volume excerpt + instructions)] } }
System prompt encodes PZ v3 (5 rules) + required body sections + front-matter schema inline — no runtime template lookup
SCHEMA.md itself correctly REJECTED by validator (contains 'Docente, leggi' as reject-example) — meta-doc, not wiki content
Shebang removed from both .mjs scripts (Vite SSR transform injectQuery shim breaks #!/usr/bin/env node prefix) — scripts invoked via 'node scripts/...'
Inline minimal YAML parser preferred over extra dep (js-yaml) — isolation from src/, zero runtime coupling
CoV 3x via serial bash vitest delivered (PTC code_execution container config deferred Day 25, same semantics 3× independent invocations)
Functionality 4.0 (Day 23 docs-only) → 7.5 (Day 24 runnable) composite +0.85 — runtime delivery pivot closes Harness 2.0 functionality gap
gaps_enumerated: GAP-DAY24-01 P2 lesson count drift — 25 actual (lesson-groups.js) vs 27 documented (SCHEMA/index/CLAUDE.md). Andrea decision Day 25: add 2 lessons OR update docs
GAP-DAY24-02 P2 tech debt — 13 high-severity npm audit indirect deps post axe-core install (all transitive via rollup/vitest/axe graph). Day 25 npm audit fix non-breaking + document residuals
GAP-DAY24-03 P3 — PTC code_execution container config deferred. CoV 3x delivered via serial bash (same semantics). Day 25 .claude/tools-config.json if token budget allows
GAP-DAY24-04 P3 — E2E Playwright not run Day 24 (axe-helper stub untested in real browser). Day 25 tests/e2e/e2e-smoke.spec.js (2 spec) + axe-helper integration baseline
GAP-DAY24-05 P3 — Benchmark not re-run Day 24 (carry 4.79). Day 25 node scripts/benchmark.cjs --write end-of-day to capture test_count contribution
GAP-DAY24-06 P3 — MCP explicit calls Day 24 = 0 (target ≥10). Day 25 structured day-start claude-mem smart_search + mid-day save_observation + serena get_symbols_overview + context7 query-docs
next_actions_day_25: STEP 0 MCP discipline: claude-mem smart_search 'together-ai-batch-dispatch 2026' + serena get_symbols_overview + context7 query-docs '@together-ai/sdk batches'
S4.1.4 Together AI Batch API POST /v1/batches with /tmp/wiki-batch-all.jsonl input (117 records), poll completion, download outputs, pipe each through wiki-validate-file.mjs
npm audit fix non-breaking + documented residual acceptance for indirect transitive deps
E2E smoke 2 spec Playwright + axe-helper integration baseline (tests/e2e/e2e-smoke.spec.js)

honest_notes: Day 24 Harness 2.0 composite 7.6/10 above 7.5 floor, +0.85 vs Day 23 6.75 — functionality climb 4.0→7.5 is the main driver
MCP call count 0 explicit is a real quality gap — Harness 2.0 ≥10 target not met. Substituted with cheap native Read/Grep/Bash for Day 24 work, acceptable but not excellent
Ratchet discipline respected: +28 tests above +15/day floor
Zero regression: all 3 CoV runs identical 12248 PASS across 213 files
Lesson count drift 25 vs 27 is doc-only; scripts use actual 25, no runtime impact
